mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM eval_indicator
AND indicator_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{indicatorName}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY sort ASC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM eval_indicator WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY sort ASC, id DESC
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(weight), 0) FROM eval_indicator WHERE status = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO eval_indicator (indicator_name, weight, sort, status, description, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{indicatorName}, #{weight}, #{sort}, #{status}, #{description}, NOW(), NOW())
